class.name: PhysicsShapeRestInfoResult3D
class.brief_description: Stores the nearest collision information of a shape query.
class.description: This class contains the collision data computed by [method PhysicsDirectSpaceState3D.get_rest_info]. If the shape collides with multiple objects, only the nearest collision is stored.

method.name: get_collider_id
method.description: Returns the unique ID of the colliding shape.

method.name: get_collider_rid
method.description: Returns the [RID] of the colliding shape.

method.name: get_collider_shape
method.description: Returns the shape index of the colliding shape.

method.name: get_collider_velocity
method.description: Returns the linear velocity of the colliding object. If the object is an [Area3D], the result is [code]Vector3(0, 0, 0)[/code].

method.name: get_collision_normal
method.description: Returns the collision normal at the intersection point, pointing away from the colliding shape.

method.name: get_collision_point
method.description: Returns the collision point on the colliding shape.
